author.bio: 🇪🇺 Dad-of-3. Developer Advocate at @Google (🇩🇪), PhD from @la_UPC (🇪🇸), Postdoc at @UniversiteLyon (🇫🇷). #PWA #JavaScript #NodeJS #Fugu 🐡 #SemanticWeb
author.name: Thomas Steiner

content.text:
Nice job on the dark mode implementation! One more tip for the images: https://web.dev/prefers-color-scheme/#re-colorize-and-darken-photographic-images.

Another #a11y idea for the header font effect: I love it, but it can be distracting to some: https://developers.google.com/web/updates/2019/03/prefers-reduced-motion.
content.html:
Nice job on the dark mode implementation! One more tip for the images: https://web.dev/prefers-color-scheme/#re-colorize-and-darken-photographic-images.

Another #a11y idea for the header font effect: I love it, but it can be distracting to some: https://developers.google.com/web/updates/2019/03/prefers-reduced-motion.
